~Notes~                            
                        Good things about free healthcare;
1.people who struggle financially will have a easier time getting help without worrying about money
2.less people die.       <—— can connect to the 1
3.can increase economic stability
4.can help make doctors focus more on the patients rather than money
5. Counter argument for 2 and 3 for negative; there is multiple countries (?) who has free health care, and they seem to not struggle with wait time or lower quality items. 



Bad things about free health care;
1.counter argument for argument 1 in affirmative; Taxes could go up
2.waiting times might go up due to more people getting help
3.lower quality 
4.less choice in doctor 
5.not enough doctors   <——- could connect to 4
6. Reduce personal responsibility

Affirmative first debate; 

Free healthcare is exactly what is sounds like, you get to have FREE HEALTHCARE! Wow!?
Free healthcare has been a hot topic for some time, and it’s only becoming more common as time goes on. Those who don’t approve of healthcare must really enjoy suffering, ayyyyy!


As a show of hands, who enjoys the idea of having ‘affordable’ healthcare? 

Pick ONE depending on what happens!

If multiple people show their hands; great! That’s all the evidence I need.
For context; healthcare has been a huge deal for sometime, as stated. And many people now days can’t afford said healthcare because either; their insurance doesn’t cover it or obviously, they can’t afford it with hard earn money. If healthcare was free this would help prevent that struggle. This will also decrease risks of death because of people easily accessing healthcare without worrying about payment 




If no one shows their hands; ah well…that’s awkward.

Sip water slowly
